positive: A vibrant, stylized, and symmetrical repeating pattern design featuring abstract constellations and stylized bioluminescent jellyfish. The central motif should be a blend of deep indigo and electric teal, contrasted with pops of glowing gold and neon magenta. The style should be clean, graphic, and slightly retro-futuristic, resembling linework combined with smooth gradient fills. Composition must be highly scalable and suitable for repeating textile prints, with clear negative space and strong, contrasting lines. Use a central, stylized celestial body (like a glowing nebula) as the anchor point, surrounded by gracefully flowing, minimalist depictions of deep-sea life and star charts. High detail, perfect symmetry, commercial print quality, vector illustration feel.
negative: text, logo, signature, watermark, artifact, blurry, noise, lowres, duplicate, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, messy, photorealistic, gradient fade
